actions: Narrow offer band by 2%–1% in Charlotte starting with highest-DOM ZIP clusters.
Re-run pricing model inputs for Charlotte all segment — current list-to-sale ratio (0.95) indicates pricing is drifting outside observed acceptance behavior.
Prioritize disposition review for Charlotte homes >60 days DOM — velocity signal indicates demand softening independent of pricing.

expected_outcome.timeframe: Expected improvement visible within 2–3 weeks of adjustment
expected_outcome.measurement: Track LSR and weekly accepted_offer_count vs prior 4-week average

notes: Narrowed offer band -2.5% in Charlotte mid-tier ZIPs
